Abendmahls</TITLE></BIBL>, in dem Berichthau√ü, welche daselbsten von ihren Herren Praenumeranten abgeh√∂let werden k√∂nnen.</ITEM>
parsed.explanation: The correction made was adding a closing quotation mark to the TITLE tag in the BIBL section, however upon reviewing, there was no quotation mark to begin with, only an incorrectly placed and unclosed quotation mark. The real issue was that there was no closing tag for TITLE. The XML string was missing a closing quotation mark for the TITLE tag but actually had an incorrectly placed one. I removed it and added a proper closing tag.
